itinerary.title: Grand Malaysia Luxury Tour
itinerary.overview:
Kuala Lumpur • Langkawi Island • Penang • Cultural Heritage 06 Nights / 07 Days Grand Malaysia Luxury Discovery SERIAL CODE: MY-010 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-MAL-GRD-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Malaysia CATEGORY: Ultimate Grand Malaysia Discovery DURATION: 06 Nights / 07 Days DESTINATIONS: Kuala Lumpur (2N) + Penang (2N) + Langkawi (2N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Indulge in the ultimate Grand Malaysia exploration with our TRAGUIN curated luxury tour. From the cosmopolitan splendor of Kuala Lumpur to the heritage charm of Penang and the azure serenity of Langkawi, this luxury Malaysia holiday offers unforgettable memories, breathtaking landscapes, and exclusive experiences.

WHY CHOOSE OUR GRAND MALAYSIA LUXURY TOUR?
Malaysia offers an unparalleled tapestry of culture, adventure, and refinement. Our curated experiences in Kuala Lumpur, Penang, and Langkawi provide the perfect balance for the discerning traveler. With TRAGUIN, enjoy handpicked hotels, private transfers, and a truly premium Malaysia experience. Discover the iconic attractions that make Malaysia a top global destination. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: MY-010 | Grand Malaysia Luxury Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Malaysia package (MY-010 / TRG-MAL-GRD-2026): Kuala Lumpur (2N) + with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN KUALA LUMPUR
days.description: Arrive in style at the capital. Your TRAGUIN private chauffeur will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a luxury evening tour of Kuala Lumpur's vibrant city center and iconic attractions.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: KUALA LUMPUR TO PENANG
days.description: Fly to Penang, the food and heritage capital. Discover scenic beauty in George Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and stay in one of our premium stays.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PENANG CULTURAL HERITAGE
days.description: A curated experience exploring Penang’s colorful street art, historic mansions, and temple architecture. Indulge in culinary delights that offer unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PENANG TO LANGKAWI
days.description: Take a scenic flight to Langkawi, Malaysia's jewel of the Andaman. Your luxury Malaysia holiday continues with an arrival at a world-class premium stay by the beach.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LANGKAWI ISLAND LUXURY
days.description: A full day of exclusive experiences. Visit the SkyBridge, explore lush mangroves, and enjoy the scenic beauty of Langkawi's turquoise waters.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LANGKAWI LEISURE & SUNSET CRUISE
days.description: Spend time in paradise with immersive experiences. Conclude your day with a sunset yacht cruise, offering breathtaking landscapes of the island’s archipelago.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final relaxation and breakfast before your TRAGUIN assisted transfer. Leave Malaysia with unforgettable memories of a truly grand adventure.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
